name: Server Sync
description: Server Sync is a Jellyfin plugin that enables synchronization of media content between multiple Jellyfin servers. Supports parent-child relationships where children sync back to the parent, and peer-to-peer relationships for bi-directional synchronization.
overview: Synchronize media content between Jellyfin servers

versions.changelog:
## Fixes
- Fix AssemblyVersion to match build.yaml version

## Fixes
- Fix build.sh to include all dependency DLLs in release package

## Fixes
- Package all dependencies
- Rebuild attempt
- Version bump

## Fixes
- Package all dependencies
- Increment correctly

## Features
- One-way media sync from source Jellyfin server using API key authentication
- Library mapping with automatic path translation between source and local servers
- ETag-based change detection for identifying updated content
- Granular approval modes (Enabled/RequireApproval/Disabled) for new content, replacements, and deletions
- Recycling bin for soft-deleting replaced or removed files with configurable retention period
- Bandwidth throttling with configurable speed limits (KB/s, MB/s, GB/s)
- Time-based bandwidth scheduling for off-peak unlimited downloads
- Concurrent downloads with configurable limit (1-10 simultaneous)
- Minimum free disk space protection to prevent disk exhaustion
- Per-file disk space validation before each download
- Companion file support for external subtitles, NFO files, and images
- Automatic retry for failed downloads with configurable max attempts
- Circuit breaker pattern to prevent hammering failed source servers
- Web UI for managing sync items with search, filtering, and bulk actions
- Health dashboard showing sync status, disk space, and last sync time
- Database reset capability for fresh sync state
